issues.message: Requirement "Records are kept" must contain SHALL or MUST

Header "### Implementation notes" in MODIFIED Requirements is not a "### Requirement:" header and is ignored by validation. Use "### Requirement: Implementation notes" if it should be validated as a requirement.

Change must have at least one delta. No deltas found. Ensure your change has a specs/ directory with capability folders (e.g. specs/http-server/spec.md) containing .md files that use delta headers (## ADDED/MODIFIED/REMOVED/RENAMED Requirements) and that each requirement includes at least one "#### Scenario:" block. Tip: run "openspec change show <change-id> --json --deltas-only" to inspect parsed deltas.
Purpose section is too brief (less than 50 characters)
